title: Complete Cobblemon Collection w Legendary Spawns
description: The Largest Cobblemon Addon Pack Made to Give Models and More Mon Spawns so that we can eventually reach full dex completion!
body:
## What is this pack?

Are you tired of not having models for all of the Pokémon? Are you a competitive player, or do you just want more Pokémon in your Pokédex?

This pack is the solution.

Complete Cobblemon Collection is a collaborative addon created with many different addon authors. It adds **hundreds of Pokémon** to your game, fully modeled, animated, and implemented, with the goal of completing the Pokédex in Cobblemon.

---

## How to install

1. Download the latest version of the addon
2. Add the `.zip` file to your world datapacks folder:
   `saves/[world]/datapacks`
3. Add the same `.zip` file to your resourcepacks folder:
   `resourcepacks`
4. Enable the resource pack in game:
   `Options → Resource Packs`

---
